problem: Standing up a production-grade enterprise platform skeleton with auth (SSO + RBAC), multi-tenancy, audit logs, and two initial features: user management and notification centre, so that 5 squads can independently deliver their epics without rework.
primaryUser: Platform team (4 engineers) + 5 downstream feature squads; end-users are enterprise employees behind Okta SSO
successCriteria: Auth flow works end-to-end with test IdP; tenant isolation proven by integration tests; both features covered by unit + integration tests; OpenAPI spec published; deployment to staging via Terraform apply passes security scan.

stories.title: Auth & RBAC Foundation
stories.description: Integrate Passport.js + JWT; define roles (ADMIN, MANAGER, MEMBER, READONLY); implement guards middleware; expose /auth/login, /auth/refresh, /auth/logout.

stories.title: Multi-Tenant Data Isolation
stories.description: PostgreSQL Row-Level Security policies keyed on tenant_id; Prisma extension to auto-inject tenantId on every query; integration tests prove cross-tenant data cannot leak.

stories.title: User Management Feature
stories.description: CRUD for users within a tenant; admin-only invite flow; bulk import CSV; audit trail for every mutation.

stories.title: Notification Centre Feature
stories.description: In-app notification store (read/unread, pagination); email delivery via SendGrid; webhook delivery with retry; tenant-level notification preferences.

stories.title: Infra & Security Baseline
stories.description: Terraform modules for VPC, RDS, ECS, ALB, secrets in AWS Secrets Manager; Security Hub baseline scan; WAF rules; DR runbook.

stackConstraints: Node 20 LTS, NestJS, Prisma + PostgreSQL 16, React 18, Terraform 1.7, AWS ECS Fargate
externalIntegrations: Okta SAML, SendGrid, Datadog, PagerDuty, GitHub Actions for CI
openQuestions: Will Okta SSO be SAML or OIDC?
Redis required for session store or stateless JWT only?
Should notification centre support Slack webhooks in v1?

modelRecommendation.estimatedCostNote: Estimated $2.50–$4.00 for full enterprise plan synthesis — large context budget recommended
